hero.badge: Morocco first · Verified stays · Controlled launch
hero.title: Stays in Morocco with more safety, transparency, and comfort.
hero.subtitle: Nexa Stays is a Moroccan verified-stays platform for short-term accommodation. We help guests book with more confidence and help hosts list their properties in a clearer, more structured, and more secure environment.
hero.previewNote: Nexa Stays prioritizes clear confirmation over unverified automatic booking.

search.helperText: The exact address, welcome contact, and private check-in instructions are shared only according to the official booking confirmation status.

why.title: Booking or hosting should not feel like a risk.
why.subtitle: In Morocco, many short-term stays are still arranged through direct messages, social networks, or informal processes. Nexa Stays aims to provide a more structured local alternative — simpler, more reliable, and more transparent.
why.safetyDesc: Profiles, listings, and essential information are progressively verified to reduce fraud, misinformation, and disputes.
why.transparencyDesc: Rules, conditions, property details, booking statuses, and important steps should be clear before, during, and after the reservation process.
why.comfortDesc: Guests should understand what they are booking. Hosts should understand who is booking. Both sides benefit from a simpler and more reassuring framework.

destinations.title: Where do you want to stay next?

howItWorks.subtitle: A booking should not rely on assumptions. It should rely on clear information, visible rules, verified details, and an official status.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Search by city, arrival date, departure date, and number of guests. The exact address stays protected until confirmation.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Check photos, rules, capacity, amenities, fees, and verification level before sending a request.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Sending a request does not automatically confirm the stay. It is reviewed by the host and Nexa Stays when needed.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Private arrival information is shared only when the booking status is officially confirmed.
howItWorks.contactShared: Private arrival details shared according to platform process

hostCta.title: List your property with more structure and credibility.
hostCta.subtitle: Nexa Stays supports individual hosts, property owners, managers, agencies, hotels, hostels, residences, guesthouses, and riads that want to offer short-term stays in a more professional framework.
hostCta.bullet2: Rules and conditions visible before booking
hostCta.bullet3: More qualified requests from informed guests
hostCta.bullet4: Local support adapted to the Moroccan market

footer.tagline: Moroccan verified-stays platform — safety, transparency, and comfort for guests and hosts.
footer.secured: Nexa Stays is currently in a controlled launch phase in Morocco.
footer.disclaimer: Nexa Stays is a Moroccan digital platform for verified short-term stays. Features, fees, cities, verification processes, and availability may evolve during the launch phase. Use of the service is subject to our Legal Notice, Privacy Policy, and Platform Policies.

login.title: Enter your phone

listings.staysSubtitle: Explore short-term accommodation with clearer information, visible rules, hosts verified according to the required level, and a better-structured booking request process.

listings.tryAdjusting: Try adjusting your filters or search.
listings.noSurprises: The exact address and private arrival details are shared only when your booking is officially confirmed.

bookingVerification.title: Guest verification
bookingVerification.subtitle: To protect hosts, property, and all guests — we collect identity details for every stay.
bookingVerification.whyDesc: Verification helps protect hosts and property, creates accountability, supports lawful action when needed, and keeps everyone safe. We never share your details beyond what's required for your booking.
bookingVerification.syncProfileDesc: I consent to use my verified profile information (name, phone, email) for this booking.
bookingVerification.verifiedPrimaryHint: Using your verified identity — no ID re-upload needed.
bookingVerification.subtitleAdditionalOnly: Your verified identity is used for the primary guest. Add details and an ID photo for each additional guest.
bookingVerification.acknowledgeName: I confirm all names match official identification.

bookings.acceptTerms: Please accept Terms and Privacy Policy to continue with payment.
bookings.paymentNotAvailable: Online payment is not available yet. Your booking is saved and will be payable once payment goes live.
bookings.cardIntegrationPending: Card payments require CMI or Payzone integration.
bookings.mockPaymentHint: Test mode: payment is simulated. No real card is charged.
bookings.termsFirst: Please accept Terms and Privacy Policy first.
bookings.acceptFailed: Failed to accept. Please try again.
bookings.contactMaskedHint: Check-in contact, exact address, and access instructions are shared after payment is confirmed.
bookings.noCheckinDetailsYet: Your host has not added check-in details yet. Contact Nexa Stays support if you need help before arrival.
bookings.standardCancellation: Standard cancellation policy applies. See listing terms for details.
bookings.guestCancelWarning: Review the estimated refund before cancelling. Confirmed cancellations cannot be undone.
bookings.hostCancelWarning: Host cancellations affect guest trust and may require support follow-up. Confirm only if the stay cannot be honored.
bookings.refundEstimateHint: Final refunds are calculated by the server from the listing policy and payment status.
bookings.cancelReasonPlaceholder: Add a short reason for support and the other party.

hostBooking.title: Booking Details
hostBooking.payoutHint: Your payout is released 24 hours after the guest checks in.

hostApply.title: Host Application
hostApply.privacyNote: Phone, email, and exact address are masked until both sides are verified and reservation is confirmed.
hostApply.step1Subtitle: Tell us what type of host you are. This helps us organize your application.
hostApply.step1ApartmentDesc: Apartments, studios, houses, villas, or single units
hostApply.step1HotelDesc: Hotels, residences, aparthotels, or multiple rooms
hostApply.step1HostelDesc: Hostels, dorms, shared rooms, or backpacker stays
hostApply.step2Subtitle: Use the same name as your documents if verification is requested. Confirm your email by typing it twice — no email code is sent.
hostApply.step3Subtitle: We will send a one-time SMS code to your phone. This step does not use email.
hostApply.step4Subtitle: This protects guests, hosts, and property owners. Required to become a host on Nexa Stays.
hostApply.submittedDesc: Thanks! We have received your host application and identity verification. Our team will review it and you will be notified once you are approved.
hostApply.approvedDesc: Your host application has been approved. Welcome to Nexa Stays!
hostApply.rejectedDesc: Our team reviewed your host application and could not approve it yet. Fix the issue below, then apply again.
hostApply.launchNote: Nexa Stays is currently in a controlled launch phase. Host applications are reviewed progressively.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.subtitle: Effective Date: 24 February 2026 · By using Nexa Stays, you agree to these terms.
terms.agreementBody: These Terms and Conditions ("Terms") govern your access to and use of Nexa Stays. By creating an account or using the platform, you agree to these Terms.
terms.eligibilityBody: You must provide accurate information and maintain the security of your account. Nexa Stays may restrict or suspend accounts for violations, fraud, or security risks.
terms.idVerificationIntro: Identity verification is required during registration. Users may browse while verification is pending, but certain actions remain locked until verified:
terms.idVerificationEnd: Nexa Stays may request additional verification when needed for safety, fraud prevention, or compliance.
terms.contactMaskingBody: Contact details (phone/email) and exact property address may be masked until both sides are verified and a reservation is confirmed.
terms.noBypassNote: Users agree not to attempt to bypass the platform using masked details, coded messages, or off-platform payment requests.
terms.hostRespIntro: Hosts must ensure listings are accurate and up-to-date, including:
terms.requiredMedia: Required walkthrough video and photo standards
terms.noUndisclosedFees: Hosts must not add undisclosed fees after booking confirmation.
terms.respectRules: Respect house rules and local laws
terms.guestRespEnd: Undeclared occupants or rule violations may lead to cancellation without refund.
terms.occupantsBody: For safety and compliance, guests must declare all adult occupants as required during booking. Nexa Stays may restrict bookings that do not comply.
terms.paymentsBody: Payments may be processed through external payment providers. Nexa Stays does not store raw card data. Payment failures may result in cancellation.
terms.refundsBody: Refunds are governed by the Refund Policy. Users agree to provide evidence when requesting refunds for "different place" or similar claims.
terms.refundsBodySuffix: . Users agree to provide evidence when requesting refunds for "different place" or similar claims.
terms.reviewsBody: Content must be truthful and not abusive, discriminatory, or illegal. Nexa Stays may remove content that violates policy.
terms.bypassPlatform: Bypass contact masking or off-platform payment rules
terms.suspensionBody: Nexa Stays may suspend or terminate accounts for safety, fraud prevention, repeated policy violations, or legal compliance.
terms.liabilityBody: Nexa Stays provides a platform connecting hosts and guests. To the maximum extent allowed by law, Nexa Stays is not liable for indirect losses resulting from third-party actions.
terms.changesBody: We may update features, policies, and these Terms. Updates will be posted with a revised effective date.
terms.localComplianceBody: Users must comply with all applicable local laws and regulations related to lodging, identity checks, and guest registration.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Effective Date: 24 February 2026 · How we collect, use, and protect your information.
privacy.whoWeAre: Nexa Stays ("Nexa") provides a booking and property-listing platform for hotels and apartments. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, share, and protect personal information.
privacy.accountDetails: Account details: full legal name, phone number, email, password (hashed)
privacy.idVerification: Identity verification: government ID type/number, ID images, profile photo
privacy.bookingInfo: Booking information: reservation details, declared occupants, messages
privacy.hostInfo: Host information: property details, check-in contact, payout/bank info
privacy.deviceData: Device and usage data (interactions, log events, IP, approximate location)
privacy.cookies: Cookies/local storage for session, security, and analytics
privacy.paymentsNote: We do not store raw card details. Payments handled by external PSPs. We may store tokens and transaction references.
privacy.whyCollectList: Create and manage accounts; Verify identity and enforce safety; Facilitate bookings; Prevent fraud; Provide support; Meet legal obligations
privacy.contactMaskingNote: Phone numbers, emails, and exact addresses are masked until both sides are verified and a reservation is confirmed. Before confirmation, communication is handled through in-platform messaging.
privacy.shareGuestsBody: After booking is confirmed (and both verified), we share relevant identity and booking details for safe check-in and compliance.
privacy.shareProvidersBody: We share data with providers who help run the platform (hosting, analytics, messaging, payment). They must protect data and use it only for Nexa services.
privacy.shareLegalBody: We may disclose information if required by law, court order, or to protect platform integrity.
privacy.retentionBody: We keep personal data only as long as necessary for active account operations, dispute resolution, fraud prevention, and legal obligations. Verification data may be retained longer for security or audits.
privacy.securityNote: No system is perfectly secure, but we work to reduce risks significantly.
privacy.rightsBody: Depending on applicable law, you may request access, correction, deletion, or account closure. Requests can be made via customer support.
privacy.childrenBody: Nexa Stays is not intended for children. If we learn we collected data from a child unlawfully, we will delete it.
privacy.updatesBody: We may update this policy to reflect changes in the platform or legal requirements. We will post the updated policy with a revised effective date.

refund.title: Refund Policy
refund.subtitle: Effective Date: 24 February 2026 · We protect both guests and hosts with evidence-based resolution.
refund.purposeBody: This Refund Policy explains when refunds may be issued and how disputes are handled fairly for both guests and hosts.
refund.principle1: Refunds depend on the booking status, timing, and evidence.
refund.principle2: Nexa Stays aims to protect both sides using an evidence-based process.
refund.principle3: All refund requests must be submitted through Nexa Stays support with supporting proof where required.
refund.materiallyDifferent: The property is materially different from what was booked (significant mismatch, not minor differences).
refund.baitSwitch: The location is not the same as advertised (bait-and-switch).
refund.noCheckin: Host fails to provide check-in access without a valid solution.
refund.safetyIssue: Confirmed safety or compliance issue prevents staying.
refund.proofIntro: The guest must provide proof, including where possible:
refund.proofFailure: Failure to provide reasonable proof may result in rejection or partial refund.
refund.falseClaimsTitle: 5. False or Unsupported Claims — Partial Refund Rule
refund.falseClaimsIntro: If the investigation determines the property was not materially different and the claim was unsupported or the guest simply changed their mind:
refund.falseClaimsNote: This rule exists to protect hosts from unfair losses while still providing a fair outcome.
refund.hostIssuesBody: If a host adds fees after booking that were not disclosed, changes rules materially, asks the guest to leave early without valid cause, or creates unreasonable requirements, Nexa Stays may issue a refund or partial refund based on severity, timing, and evidence.
refund.cancellationsBody: Refund outcomes vary based on: cancellation time relative to check-in, whether the stay has started, host cancellation policy, and whether a dispute is involved. Nexa Stays may enforce default cancellation options depending on listing type and local requirements.
refund.processing1: Approved refunds are sent to the original payment method where possible.
refund.processing2: Processing times depend on the payment provider and banks.
refund.processing3: Some transaction fees may be non-refundable where permitted by law.
refund.abuseBody: Repeated refund abuse, false claims, or manipulation may result in account restrictions, suspension, or permanent removal from the platform.

about.title: A Moroccan verified-stays platform built for safer, clearer short-term accommodation.
about.subtitle: Nexa Stays is created to make short-term accommodation safer, clearer, and more comfortable for both guests and hosts. We are building a local alternative for a market that needs more trust, better structure, and clearer information before a stay is confirmed.
about.problemTitle: Too often, the same problems keep happening.
about.problemBody: We built Nexa Stays from repeating real-life situations that leave both guests and hosts feeling unprotected.
about.guest1: Places that don't match the photos
about.guest3: Surprise fees added at the last minute
about.host3: Long task lists after high platform fees
about.approachTitle: Safety, transparency, and comfort for both sides.
about.approachSubtitle: A platform is useful only if it creates trust for everyone involved. Nexa Stays is built around three core principles.
about.pillar1Desc: Safety means reducing unnecessary risk before, during, and after a booking. Nexa Stays protects exact addresses, reviews listings, structures host information, and tracks request statuses.
about.pillar2Desc: Transparency means guests and hosts should not depend on assumptions. Rules, capacity, pricing, arrival conditions, verification levels, and booking statuses should be visible and understandable.
about.pillar3Desc: Comfort is not only about the property. It is also about the process. Guests should feel more confident before arrival. Hosts should feel more protected before accepting a request.
about.privacyBody: We protect privacy with a strict rule: contact details are masked until both sides are verified and the booking is confirmed.
about.privacyRule1: No direct phone numbers before confirmation
about.privacyRule2: No emails used to bypass the platform
about.privacyRule3: No exact address shared before confirmation
about.privacyRule4: Communication stays inside Nexa until booking is real
about.guestFeeLabel: Guest fee — among the lowest in the market
about.feeSplitNote: We split fees fairly. Guests pay less. Owners keep more. Bookings grow faster.
about.matchingBody: A good stay is also about fit. Nexa Stays introduces a more human layer so guests find places that truly suit them.
about.partnerBody: If you manage properties, hotels, or a portfolio of units, we can onboard you as a featured partner.

contact.title: Contact
contact.heading: We are here to help
contact.subtitle: Questions about bookings, host applications, partnerships, or investments? Contact Nexa Stays and we will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.supportDesc: For booking questions, account help, verification, or reporting an issue.
contact.portfolioDesc: Manage 10+ apartments/hotel rooms? We can onboard you as a priority partner with faster setup and dedicated support.
contact.investmentsDesc: For investment discussions and strategic partnerships.
contact.replyNote: We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help...
contact.detailsNote: Your details are used only to respond to your request.

safety.badge: Verified listings · Protected information · Clear statuses
safety.title: Safety and transparency for guests and hosts.
safety.subtitle: Nexa Stays is built around a simple principle: a short-term stay should be clear, traceable, and protected before it is confirmed.
safety.approachTitle: Trust should be built into the process, not only promised.
safety.approachBody: Many short-term stays depend on fragmented conversations, screenshots, or informal payment arrangements. Nexa Stays adds structure: verification, rules, booking status, and private data protection so guests and hosts can decide with more clarity.
safety.coreStatement: Safety is not one feature. It is a complete process: verify what matters, display what must be public, protect what must remain private, and track every important booking step.
safety.guestTitle: Guests need reliable information before they travel.
safety.guestPoint1Desc: Review property type, city, neighborhood, capacity, amenities, rules, price, and verification level before moving forward.
safety.guestPoint2Desc: Important rules are shown before booking, including capacity, smoking policy, pets, visitors, and check-in conditions.
safety.guestPoint3Desc: The exact address is not displayed publicly. It is shared only according to the official booking confirmation status.
safety.guestPoint4Desc: See whether your request is sent, under review, approved pending payment, confirmed, declined, cancelled, or completed.
safety.guestReminder: Never treat a stay as confirmed until the official booking status clearly says confirmed.
safety.hostTitle: Hosts need protection before they open their property.
safety.hostPoint1Desc: Host applications and identity verification are reviewed before hosts can publish listings.
safety.hostPoint2Desc: Listings are reviewed progressively before publication or full verification during the launch phase.
safety.hostPoint3Desc: Guests understand rules and conditions before sending a request, reducing misunderstandings.
safety.hostPoint4Desc: Exact address and welcome contact remain protected until the booking reaches the required confirmation status.
